programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Blue Toes and Shower Woes in Avon, North Carolina
programs.desc: After discovering Avon, North Carolina during a beach vacation, a family of four searches for a fixer-upper. Once they've found their hidden gem, it's all hands on deck.

programs.title: The Garden Gurus
programs.desc: On this week's episode of the Garden Gurus, Trevor continues his journey through European Gardens, with Viking. Back in AUS, Bonnie gives you her Top 5 Waterwise Plants for your garden, plus great potting ideas and techniques.

programs.title: The Block
programs.desc: Keith puts the pressure on everyone to work harder in the communal area. Steve steps outside his comfort zone and goes shopping on his own for the first time. He and Chantelle think they have this week's secret room-winning formula.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Puerto Vallarta Rent vs. Buy, Oh My
programs.desc: A young family leaves San Francisco to move to her dream locale of Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. She wants a turnkey property to ensure an easy transition, but with a hot real estate market, they may have to consider renting over buying to get settled fast.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: A Texas man convinces his husband to put their lives on hold and move to Maidstone, England. They're looking for a place big enough to accommodate their three kids, but navigating the differences between Texas and European real estate may be a challenge.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina return to the street of a previous flip in Cypress, California, when they can't agree on a design for the kitchen, they decide to settle matters with a quick game of hoops.
